summary: Comprehensive testing of Spectra Flow AI-powered prospecting platform completed. Backend APIs working at 97.3% success rate, frontend fully functional with excellent user experience. All core features operational including auth, dashboard, navigation, leads management, and bilingual support.

security_issues.issue: JWT tokens remain valid after logout
security_issues.impact: Security concern - tokens should be invalidated

status_code_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for creation operations
status_code_issues.impact: Minor - functionality works but incorrect HTTP status

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks, preventing form submission

integration_issues.issue: No clickable job elements found for viewing job details and progress timeline

console_warnings.issue: Chart rendering warnings - width/height (-1) should be greater than 0
console_warnings.component: Recharts components on Dashboard and Analytics

console_warnings.issue: HTML validation warnings - nested div in p tags

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 11 KPI cards and charts
All sidebar navigation links work (8 pages)
Lead detail drawer with approve/reject actions

high_priority: Fix modal overlay interception issue in campaign/template creation dialogs - use force=true for clicks or adjust z-index
medium_priority: Implement proper JWT token invalidation on logout for security
Add clickable job detail functionality to Jobs page with progress timeline view
low_priority: Fix HTTP status codes for creation endpoints (return 201 instead of 200)
Resolve chart rendering warnings by ensuring proper container dimensions
Fix HTML validation warnings in dashboard activity feed
